caption: Postgres RAG Architecture — three-lane pipeline diagram showing Content Ingestion (file watcher, Kafka, consumer), Slide Generation (LangGraph orchestrator, FastMCP, gate chain), and Rendering (FastAPI, browser) with PostgreSQL as the full-width foundation serving as control plane, data store, and event bus
alt_text: Swimlane pipeline architecture diagram for a Postgres-centric AI slide generator with Kafka automated ingestion, LangGraph orchestration, MCP tool boundary, six-gate validation, and real-time SSE rendering
